name: Coffee-Toffee-Torte
recipeInstructions:
Prepare cake according to package instructions and bake in a 10-inch tube pan. Cool thoroughly. Prepare pudding according to package instructions, using only 1 1/3 cups milk and add the instant coffee. Chill pudding for 10 minutes.
Split cake into three layers. Break toffee bars (I use Heath bars) into small bits. Fold half of the whipped cream into the pudding. Spread half this mixture between the layers and sprinkle each layer with some toffee bits. For frosting, fold remaining whipped cream into the remaining filling mixture. Frost the cake and sprinkle the sides and top of the cake with the toffee bits. Chill until ready to serve.
